text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's the annual summer camp, and Fuji Kiseki's
younger schoolmates swoon as she leads
everyone in proper dorm leader fashion.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's as reliable as ever, and there's no doubt
she'll become even more valiant in their eyes by
the end of summer camp!
